fields.name: Support Text
fields.default: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Reach out to our customer support team.

default.answer: You boil the hell out of it. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Quas cupiditate laboriosam fugiat.

default.question: Why do you never see elephants hiding in trees?
default.answer: Because they're so good at it. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Quas cupiditate laboriosam fugiat.
